best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-pathfinder-003 title: verify navigation back to homepage without a suggestion module: pathfinder source pages: 3 preconditions: user is on the pathfinder page. test data: test steps: 1. click on back (no). 2. verify if the question is displayed. 3. select a response. 4. verify if there is no suggested location. expected result: the question should be displayed, and the process should end without showing a suggested location. the homepage should not open.
